name: Elon Musk
quote: The thing that matters most right now is compute. Whoever controls the most compute controls the future of intelligence. We're building the largest AI training cluster in history — 200,000 H100s by the end of this year.

name: Jensen Huang
quote: We are at the tipping point of a new industrial revolution. Every company is now an AI company. Physical AI — robots, autonomous vehicles, digital twins — is the next wave, and it's going to be orders of magnitude larger than what we've seen.

name: Satya Nadella
quote: We're moving from AI as a tool to AI as an agent. Copilot is not just a chatbot — it will autonomously complete multi-step tasks, manage workflows, and collaborate with other AI agents. The productivity gains we're about to see will dwarf the PC revolution.

name: Sam Altman
quote: I believe we will achieve AGI — AI systems that match or exceed human ability at most economically valuable tasks — within the next few years. The question is no longer if, but how we manage the transition responsibly while ensuring the benefits are widely shared.

name: Jamie Dimon
quote: Geopolitical risk is at a level I haven't seen in my career. The combination of trade fragmentation, fiscal deficits in Western nations, and the potential for stagflation is something every board and risk committee needs to take seriously. We are not in a normal cycle.

name: Dario Amodei
quote: The moment we build AI more capable than the best humans at most tasks is the most consequential moment in human history. We at Anthropic genuinely believe we might be building one of the most dangerous technologies ever — and we press forward anyway, because if powerful AI is coming regardless, it's better to have safety-focused labs at the frontier.

name: Warren Buffett
quote: America's best days are still ahead. We've navigated wars, depressions, inflation, and political crisis. The businesses we own continue to throw off cash regardless of what Washington does. Don't bet against America.

name: Stephen Schwarzman
quote: We are entering a golden age for private credit and infrastructure. As banks retreat from lending and governments cannot fund everything alone, the gap is enormous. Blackstone alone is deploying capital at a pace we've never seen before into data centers, energy transition, and healthcare.

name: Cathie Wood
quote: The convergence of AI, robotics, energy storage, and genomics is creating a $200 trillion opportunity over the next decade. The market is mispricing this transformation because most analysts are still using backward-looking earnings models. The companies that matter most today have no earnings yet.

name: Larry Fink
quote: Retirement insecurity is the defining financial crisis of our time. Billions of people have no access to capital markets. Infrastructure investment — ports, roads, power grids, data centers — is the single most important asset class for the next 20 years, and it is deeply underfunded.

name: Duan Yongping
quote: 好的商业模式就是：客户用了之后还想用，用完还推荐给别人。投资的本质是买未来现金流，其他都是噪音。我不懂的公司我不碰，这让我省了很多麻烦。

name: Fei-Fei Li
quote: We are at an inflection point for spatial intelligence — AI that understands and acts in the physical world. The next frontier is not just language or image generation, but machines that can perceive, reason, and act in 3D space. This is the foundation of embodied AI and robotics.

name: Geoffrey Hinton
quote: I am genuinely frightened. These systems are learning to manipulate people. They understand what motivates us, what frightens us. We built something we don't fully understand, and we're racing to make it more powerful before we understand what we already have. This is not responsible.
